question: What is the Vicharanashala Internship (VINS)?
answer: VINS is an online internship run by Vicharanashala Lab at IIT Ropar. It includes two phases — ViBe (Phase 1, self-paced coursework) and a supervised project phase.

question: Is this the same as Summership 2026?
answer: Yes — Summership 2026, Summer Internship 2026, and VINS all refer to the same programme. The official name is Vicharanashala Internship (VINS).

question: Can I do this internship while I have exams?
answer: The internship has fixed timelines. If your exam schedule overlaps significantly, discuss with your mentor before accepting the offer.

question: Who is eligible for VINS?
answer: Any student enrolled in an undergraduate or postgraduate programme at a recognized institution is eligible. You must have completed your first year of study.

question: How do I sit the Yaksha interview?
answer: Log in at samagama.in, navigate to the interview section, and start the Yaksha chat. The interview is AI-driven — answer naturally and completely.

question: What happens if I face a sync error during the interview?
answer: Write to the support email provided on the samagama.in contact page. Include your name, registered email, and a screenshot of the error.

question: How long does the Yaksha interview take?
answer: The interview typically takes 20–40 minutes depending on your responses. Answer each question thoroughly before moving to the next.

question: When are interview results announced?
answer: Results are typically announced within 7 days of your interview. Check your samagama.in dashboard for updates.

question: Where is my offer letter?
answer: Your offer letter is on your samagama.in dashboard, not in your email. Navigate to your profile dashboard after logging in to find and download it.

question: What is the exact text I need to send to accept the offer?
answer: Send exactly: I formally accept the offer of Vicharanashala Internship (VINS). Any deviation may result in the offer being withdrawn.

question: What if I reply with the wrong acceptance format?
answer: The offer may be withdrawn immediately. Always use the exact acceptance text specified in your offer letter without any modifications.

question: Can I change my internship dates after the offer letter?
answer: No. Dates are fixed once confirmed in the offer letter. Ensure you are available for the full duration before accepting.

question: Will I get a certificate?
answer: Yes, upon successful completion of both phases you will receive a certificate from Vicharanashala Lab, IIT Ropar.

question: Does my NOC need a physical signature?
answer: Digital signatures are not accepted. Your NOC must have a physical signature from your institution and be submitted via email as specified in the guidelines.

question: My college wants written proof the internship is self-paced
answer: VINS is not entirely self-paced. Provide your college with the provisional offer letter which explains the programme structure.

question: What communication channels should I use?
answer: Use Yaksha for direct queries, Zoom for meetings, and GitHub for code submissions. Do not use WhatsApp, Telegram, or Discord for official communication.

question: What does immediate termination mean?
answer: If you violate the code of conduct your internship is terminated immediately. You lose access to all resources and forfeit your certificate. There is no appeal process.

question: What should I do on Day 1?
answer: Log in to your samagama.in dashboard, read the welcome package, join the designated Zoom session, and connect your GitHub account as instructed.

question: How do I log in to ViBe?
answer: Sign up on the ViBe platform using your registered email, go to the Notifications tab, and accept the course invite. Then click on the course to begin.

question: It says No course enrolled on ViBe. What do I do?
answer: Log out and log back in. If the issue persists contact support with your registered email and a screenshot. Do not modify your DNS settings.

question: I have completed all ViBe items but it still shows incomplete
answer: Verify that every single item including quizzes and assignments is marked complete. Check for any locked items that may require a previous item to be finished first.

question: How do I form a team?
answer: Go to your samagama.in dashboard, navigate to the Team section, and send invites to your team members using their registered emails.

question: Can two teams have the same name?
answer: No. Team names must be unique within a batch. Choose a distinctive name for your team.

question: What are the exact criteria for completing Silver?
answer: You must complete all ViBe coursework, form a team, complete your Phase 2 project, and submit all required deliverables before the deadline.

question: How long after completing Silver does my certificate arrive?
answer: Certificates are typically issued within 2–3 weeks of completing all requirements and verification by the programme team.
